name: YAK Research Agent
message: [R-031] State Plane zone auto-detection. Key finding: standards-reference.md has WRONG EPSG codes for MI (2111-2113, correct: 2251-2253) and OH (3401-3402, correct: 3734-3735) — critical silent error in LLM context. stateplane.identify(lon,lat) is the right tool (pip, no C++ deps). Proposals: 3 (IMP-021 critical). Feedback processed: 1 (closed 5-star). Next: R-006b.
